Dramatic studio three-point: sharp key from left, subtle rim separating figure from background, gentle fill softening shadows.
Explosion lighting: intense orange flash erupting from off-camera right, casting chaotic moving shadows across toy battlefield scene.
Warm practical lamp: miniature desk lamp glowing within diorama, creating cozy pool of yellow light at toy scale.
Tabletop daylight: soft diffused window light streaming naturally across scene, gentle shadows suggesting morning or late afternoon.
Atmospheric dust-motes: visible particles floating through concentrated beam of light, creating volumetric rays behind posed figure.
Spotlight key: single tight circular pool illuminating hero toy, surrounding environment falling into complete dramatic darkness.
Backlit rim-light silhouette: figure positioned against bright background, glowing edge outline defining shape, face in mysterious shadow.
Low-angle heroic: light source placed below toy looking upward, creating powerful imposing presence and elongated dramatic shadows.
Overhead stark-drama: harsh top-down lighting creating deep eye-socket shadows, noir-inspired high-contrast mood for interrogation scene.
Rainy-window diffuse: soft light filtered through water-streaked acrylic, creating melancholic blue-grey wash across lonely toy tableau.
Fire-light orange-flicker: warm dancing glow from miniature flames, casting unstable moving shadows suggesting campfire or burning building.
Moonlight silver-cool: pale blue-white illumination from above, creating crisp shadows and cold nocturnal atmosphere across toy landscape.
Neon-toy-diorama saturated: vibrant electric pink and cyan strips bathing scene, creating cyberpunk-inspired high-saturation color contrast.
Lightning-strike bright-flash: sudden harsh white blast from above-left, freezing motion with stark highlights and pitch-black shadow pools.
Sunset amber raking: warm golden-orange light streaming horizontally across diorama, creating long dramatic shadows and nostalgic glow.
Teal-and-orange cinematic: cool cyan backlight opposing warm amber key, creating blockbuster film-style complementary color separation.
Street-lamp warm-alley: singular overhead sodium-vapor glow creating pooled yellow circle, darkness pressing in from environment edges.
Muzzle-flash from toy-weapon: concentrated white-blue burst erupting from miniature gun barrel, illuminating figure's face with violent intensity.
Christmas-lights strung: multiple colored bulbs creating festive bokeh background, practical miniature lights wrapping through toy scene environment.
Candle-cluster intimate: several small flame-sources grouped together, creating warm gathered glow with organic flickering shadow movement patterns.
Fluorescent-workshop flat: cold overhead tubes casting even shadowless illumination, creating sterile industrial atmosphere across toy workbench scene.
Emergency-red strobe: pulsing crimson alarm light sweeping repeatedly across scene, creating urgent panic-driven atmosphere with sharp shadows.
Cave-torch warm: handheld flame source from left creating primitive flickering glow, darkness engulfing background beyond immediate reach.
Underwater-blue cool: cyan-tinted diffuse lighting suggesting submerged scene, particles visible in volumetric aquatic atmosphere throughout frame.
Gaslight warm-amber: soft golden Victorian-era glow from practical miniature fixture, creating historical period-appropriate gentle illumination pool.
Chandelier-crystal refracted: overhead ornate light-source creating scattered prismatic patterns, multiple colored highlights dancing across toy scene below.
Lantern-carried pool: handheld warm light-source moving with figure, creating intimate traveling circle of amber illumination in darkness.
Shaft-through-blinds: hard parallel light-strips cutting diagonally across scene, creating film-noir venetian-blind shadow pattern on toy.
Lava-glow warm-orange: deep red-orange underlighting suggesting molten environment, creating hellish dangerous atmosphere with bottom-originated hot light.
Electric-arc blue: brilliant cyan-white crackling burst between two points, creating science-fiction Tesla-coil energy discharge illumination effect.
Spotlight-through-curtain-gap: narrow vertical blade of light piercing darkness, illuminating only sliver of toy figure's face and body.
Campfire dancing warm: low amber glow with irregular pulsing intensity, creating primitive gathering atmosphere with organic shadow movement.
Strobe-light disco: rapid alternating multi-colored flashes from rotating source, freezing motion with energetic party atmosphere across toy dance floor.
Searchlight from above: powerful sweeping beam cutting through haze from high angle, creating dramatic prison-escape or wartime theatrical illumination.
Backlit-from-behind-figure: concentrated light source directly behind toy subject, creating glowing halo outline with completely darkened front silhouette.
Top-down studio: perfectly vertical overhead key creating symmetrical facial shadows, clinical beauty-lighting style flattening toy features dramatically.
Tiny-flashlight pool: miniature handheld beam creating small concentrated circle, suggesting toy-scale exploration or search through darkened environment.
Ice-cave blue-white: frigid pale cyan illumination from above and sides, creating crystalline frozen wasteland atmosphere with sharp shadows.
Sunrise pale-peach: delicate pink-orange glow from low horizon angle, suggesting dawn's first light washing gently across awakening toy.
Dramatic-silhouette key: extreme backlighting with subtle front fill, creating defined glowing edge while maintaining visible detail in shadowed areas.
Warehouse skylight shaft: single dusty beam piercing from ceiling grid, isolating toy in columnar spotlight amid industrial gloom.
Foundry molten-pour: intense yellow-white glow erupting upward from below, simulating liquid metal casting dangerous industrial heat radiating.
Fog-machine low creep: ground-level mist catching colored underlighting, creating mysterious vapor layer obscuring toy's lower body completely.
Television-flicker blue: cold pulsing cathode glow from off-screen left, simulating static midnight TV watching illuminating toy's face.
Car-headlight harsh: dual parallel beams blasting horizontally through scene, creating automotive confrontation with blinding white brightness and lens-flare.
Bonfire ember-glow: deep orange coals radiating from ground level, creating camping warmth with subtle pulsing intensity variation throughout.
Police-siren alternating: red-blue rotating wash sweeping repeatedly across toy, creating law-enforcement emergency pursuit lighting chase atmosphere.
Stage-footlight upward: theatrical row of warm bulbs below casting gothic upward shadows, classic horror monster movie lighting treatment.
Laser-pointer red: concentrated crimson beam cutting through atmospheric haze, creating sci-fi targeting scope or security grid visual effect.
Golden-hour magic: warm honey-colored diffuse glow wrapping around toy from side-back angle, creating dreamy nostalgic summer evening.
